question_text: How clearly did the trainer/faculty explain the concepts and topics?
How well was the faculty prepared for the classes and lectures?
How effectively did the faculty engage students during the class?
How satisfied are you with the faculty’s teaching methodology?
How approachable and supportive was the faculty for doubt solving?
How well did the faculty maintain discipline and professionalism in class?
How relevant and useful were the assignments, practicals, or activities provided?
How effectively did the faculty connect theoretical concepts with real-world applications?
How satisfied are you with the pace and overall management of the course?
Overall, how would you rate the performance of this faculty/trainer?
